docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-14-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE NOV-14-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF BRYANT BURNSTAD REQUESTING THAT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING REGARDING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE BE CONTINUED, AND ALL SANCTION ORDERS BE SET ASIDE; ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 61346678) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61518393)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A AS TO DEFENDANT LAIB, MOUSSAAB SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-25-2017
